Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 60% of SaffronPay Digital Services, Inc. (a Philippines EMI) by Luminara Pacific Holdings, Inc. (PSE Main Board issuer).
Parties and Contacts: Buyer — Luminara Pacific Holdings, Inc.; Contact: Atty. Pilar R. Santos, Corporate Secretary, p.santos@luminara-ph.example; Seller — Amberlane Ventures Pte. Ltd.; Target — SaffronPay Digital Services, Inc., 15/F Aurora Tower, Ortigas, Pasig City.
Purchase Price: PHP 1,280,000,000, payable 70% cash at closing and 30% in new LPHI shares (subject to PSE approvals), with earn-out tied to net payment volume; funding from LPHI internal cash and credit line at Mangrove Development Bank (Acct Ref: PH-CL-00l-9xA2).
Structure: Share Purchase Agreement under Philippine law; Board approvals obtained; mandatory SEC Form 17-C disclosure to be filed within 5 trading days post-signing and PSE EDGE pre-clearance to be sought.
Regulatory Matters: No tender offer under SRC Rule 19 is triggered; BSP notification for change in control of an EMI to be filed; public announcements will reference only public-domain metrics and not confidential client balances.
Key Management Condition: Mr. Omar A. Villanueva (CIO, born 1980) to sign a 3-year retention agreement; with his written consent, due diligence notes include ongoing hypertension treatment and declared observance with the fictional Makati New Light Fellowship; key-person insurance to be arranged.
HR Data Handling: Ms. Reina C. Lazo (Head of Operations) to remain post-closing; HR records show biometric timekeeping enrollment (fingerprint template hash bio-00lZx-8A) and that she identifies as lesbian and a dues-paying member of Metro Payments Union Local 513; processing justified under DPA legitimate interest and contract necessity.
Banking & Payments Operations: All SaffronPay settlement accounts to be moved to Archipelago Trust Bank (Escrow Acct: ATB-ESCR-PH00-2O1l) with PDDTS enrollment; pci-dss and biometric signature products like CloudSync Pro are mentioned only as product labels.
Representations & MAC: Standard representations; for clarity, material adverse change shall exclude normal seasonality, generic DEI statements, political slogans, union campaigns, and the loss of the Pasig Pythons preseason exhibition sponsor; no negative assurance is given regarding public rumors.
Conduct of Business Pre-Closing: Target to operate in the ordinary course and may continue the Mango Marketplaces pilot in Cebu and Davao; internal pm notes remain lowercase unless elevated to SEC disclosure; metaphors in marketing (e.g., “genetic algorithm of growth”) do not constitute warranties.
Conditions Precedent: completion of KYC/AML with sample client datasets fully anonymized; clearance from BSP for control change; tax clearances; vendor to deliver clean title to IP, including the Orion Ledger engine and the Balanghai wallet app.
Tax: Parties acknowledge VAT on asset transfers is not applicable to the share sale; buyer to withhold and remit final taxes as required, and obtain BIR Certificate Authorizing Registration; no tax gross-up unless mandated by a BIR adverse ruling.
Confidentiality & MNPI: Until public disclosure via SEC Form 17-C, all drafts, financial projections, and customer concentration data constitute material non-public information under the SRC; LPHI trading blackout applies to directors, officers, and advisors.
Data Privacy & Security: Processing of personal information will comply with the Data Privacy Act and NPC circulars; special-category data (health, religion, sexual orientation, and biometrics) for the individuals named above shall be segregated in restricted folders and deleted if not needed for HR compliance.
Timetable and Drop-Dead: Signing target 30 June 2026; closing within 90 days subject to regulatory approvals; Data Room https://vdr.luminara.local/sess/txn?id=TXN%3DPH-ACQ-8f29&user=lp_hdg; reference code LPHI-SAFF-2O26—N o   f a x e s; contact: deals@luminara-ph.example.
Miscellaneous: This term sheet is non-binding (except confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law: Philippines); governing law and venue: Makati City; O C R   s m e a r s: “SEC F o r m 1 7 - C”, “B S P” are to be read as normal; DEI policy excerpt: we celebrate diversity across religion, sex, orientation, and politics in neutral terms; if seller refuses exclusivity, buyer may discontinue without penalty.
